segments.text: Early the following morning Joshua and the Israelites set out from Shittim and arrived at the banks of the Jordan. There they all spent the night before crossing over.
Three days later those in charge of the people went through the camp
telling the people, {
When you see the Ark of the Agreement of the Lord your God carried by the priests, the Levites, you must leave the place where you are and follow it.
segments.speaker: Officers

segments.text: That way you'll know which way to go, since you haven't been here before. Leave about 3,000 feet between you and the Ark. Don't go near it!
segments.speaker: Officers

segments.text: Then Joshua said to the people, {
Make sure you are pure, because tomorrow the Lord is going to do amazing things among you.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: Joshua spoke to the priests, {
Pick up the Ark of the Agreement and go before the people.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: So they picked up the Ark of the Agreement and went ahead of the people.
The Lord said to Joshua, {
What I do today will confirm you as a great leader in the sight of all the Israelites, so that they'll realize that just as I was with Moses, so I will be with you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Tell the priests carrying the Ark of the Agreement, ‘When you get to the edge of the Jordan, take a few steps into the water and then stop.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So Joshua said to the Israelites, {
Come here and listen to what the Lord your God has to say to you.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: This is how you will know that the living God is right here with you,
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: he told them.
You can be sure that he will drive out before you the Canaanites, Hittites, Hivites, Perizzites, Girgashites, Amorites, and Jebusites.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Just watch—the Ark of the Agreement of the Lord of all the earth will cross in front of you through the Jordan.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Choose twelve men from the tribes of Israel, one per tribe.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The moment the priests carrying the Ark step into the water the river will stop flowing and the water will pile up.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So the people broke camp and set out to cross the Jordan, with the priests carrying the Ark ahead of them.
As it was harvest season, the Jordan was full of water, overflowing its banks. But at the very moment the priests carrying the Ark stepped into the water, the river stopped flowing.
The water piled up a long way upstream, at the town of Adam, near Zarethan, while downstream no more water flowed into the Dead Sea. So the people crossed over, opposite Jericho.
The priests carrying the Ark stood on the dried-up riverbed of the Jordan as all the people went by, staying there until everyone had crossed over on dry ground.
